content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:Darkforcerising.jpg|thumb|right|180px|''[[Dark Force Rising]]'' was published on [[May 1]], 1992]]
A list of events in '''1992''' related to ''Star Wars''.

==January==
*[[January 18|18]] – [[Graeme Campbell]] dies.
*[[January 25|25]] – [[Jordan Stephens]] is born.
*[[January 26|26]] – [[Mercedes Varnado]] is born.
*?? – ''[[Planet of the Mists]]'' published.

==February==
*[[February 18|18]] – [[Dark Empire 2|''Dark Empire'' 2]] published.

==March==
[[File:JohnBoyega.jpg|thumb|right|180px|[[John Boyega]] was born on [[March 17]], 1992]]
*[[March 2|02]] – [[Anthony Lang]] dies.
*02 – [[Maisie Richardson-Sellers]] is born.
*[[March 17|17]] – [[John Boyega]] is born.

==April==
*[[April 8|08]] – [[Shelby Young]] is born.
*[[April 10|10]] – [[Daisy Ridley]] is born.
*[[April 21|21]] – [[Dark Empire 3|''Dark Empire'' 3]] published.
*[[April 22|22]] – [[The Han Solo Adventures (omnibus)|''The Han Solo Adventures'']] published.
*[[April 25|25 –]] [[Adria Arjona]] is born.
*?? – ''[[Mission to Lianna]]'' published.

==May==
*[[May 1|01]] – ''[[Dark Force Rising]]'' published.
*[[May 12|12]] – [[Varada Sethu]] is born.
*[[May 29|29]] – [[Erica Lindbeck]] is born.

==June==
[[File:GloveDarthVaderCover.jpg|thumb|180px|''[[The Glove of Darth Vader]]'' was released in on [[June 1]], 1992]]
*[[June 1|01]] – ''[[The Glove of Darth Vader]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[The Lost City of the Jedi]]'' published.
*[[June 16|16]] – [[Vitas Varnas]] is born.
*[[June 23|23]] – [[Dark Empire 4|''Dark Empire'' 4]] published.
*?? – ''[[The Abduction]]'' published.

==July==
*[[July 1|01]] – ''[[Zorba the Hutt's Revenge]]'' published.
*[[July 17|17]] – [[Billie Lourd]] is born.
*[[July 23|23]] – [[Tosin Cole]] is born.
*?? – ''[[Heir to the Empire Sourcebook]]'' published.

==August==
*[[August 1|01]] – [[Classic Star Wars 1|''Classic Star Wars'' 1]] published.
*[[August 18|18]] – [[Dark Empire 5|''Dark Empire'' 5]] published.
*[[August 30|30]] – [[Jessica Henwick]] is born.

==September==
*[[September 1|01]] – [[Classic Star Wars 2|''Classic Star Wars'' 2]] published.
*?? – ''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Two]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[The Politics of Contraband]]'' published.

==October==
*[[October 1|01]] – ''[[Star Wars: From Concept to Screen to Collectible]]'' published.
*[[October 20|20]] – [[Dark Empire 6|''Dark Empire'' 6]] published.
*[[October 20|20]] – [[Classic Star Wars 3|''Classic Star Wars'' 3]] published.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game, Second Edition]]'' published.

==November==
[[File:NaomiAckie.jpg|thumb|right|180px|[[Naomi Ackie]] was born on [[November 2]], 1992]]
*[[November 2|02]] – [[Naomi Ackie]] is born.
*[[November 4|04]] – [[Little Corvus]] is born.
*[[November 3|03]] – [[Classic Star Wars 4|''Classic Star Wars'' 4]] published.
*[[November 18|18]] – [[Nathan Kress]] is born.
*?? – [[Super Star Wars (video game)|''Super Star Wars'']] released.

==December==
*[[December 1|01]] – [[Classic Star Wars 5|''Classic Star Wars'' 5]] published.
*[[December 16|16]] – [[Ksenia Zelentsova]] is born.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Screen]]'' published.

==Unknown==
*[[Greg Kufera]] is born.
*''[[Dark Force Rising Sourcebook]]'' published.
*[[EA Digital Illusions CE]] is founded.
*– [[The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine 15|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 15]] published in Winter.
*– [[The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine 16|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 16]] published in Spring.
*– [[The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine 17|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 17]] published in Summer.
----
{{Years-RealWorld}}
